* This is a script-output (find . -name "*.sgml" --> grep --> sed, diff) * Change all occurences of freebsd.org to FreeBSD.org (including ftp., www., freefall., but also @freebsd.org --> @FreeBSD.org * Correct a typo Www.freebsd.org --> www.FreeBSD.org That I am right with this port do this patch, as an example, show: - ftp.freebsd.org. + ftp.FreeBSD.org. The link is FreeBSD, but the link-text not... strange. Or existing lines as:
  • ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD
    • I manually checked if the lines are ok, I found no wrong one. * I removed the patches against all announce.sgml's, to keep these original. * I marked this PR as high-priority, because maybe the patch will fail, because there are many files included in the diff-output. * I filed it "docs", but I don't know if "misc" would have been a better category ? Fix: This is a "hardcore" diff :-) Thus it's gzipped.
